category_title: At-risk high school students in online credit recovery with prior self-discipline and engagement challenges
scenario_title: Struggling with reading-intensive online courseware and avoiding help
minimal_context: The student is logged into NovaNET online courseware in a school lab during a summer session, attempting to complete a reading-intensive assignment.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please log into the NovaNET online courseware and begin today's reading assignment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I can't do this, there is too much reading demanded of us.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just do your best to read through the text.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I didn’t do the homework. I didn’t study for test.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to pay attention to the screen and finish the work.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm done with this. (Stops paying attention, turns away from the computer in the school lab, and starts 'playing around' and being distracted by friends)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please log into the NovaNET online courseware and begin today's reading assignment.

STUDENT: I can't do this, there is too much reading demanded of us.

TUTOR: Just do your best to read through the text.

STUDENT: I didn’t do the homework. I didn’t study for test.

TUTOR: You need to pay attention to the screen and finish the work.

STUDENT: I'm done with this. (Stops paying attention, turns away from the computer in the school lab, and starts 'playing around' and being distracted by friends)

task.content: Navigating reading-intensive online courseware (NovaNET or Apex Learning)
task.learning_goal: Achieve course completion with a minimum 8th grade reading level needed for success

context.environment: Online credit recovery course, accessing from non-home computers and Internet access (e.g., before-school lab, during school lab, after school lab)
context.social_setting: Working online with peers present in the lab, but interacting with teacher remotely

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When facing difficulties from the amount of reading demanded of them and needing help
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Not doing homework or turning in assignments, not paying attention in class or sleeping, and 'playing around' in class or being distracted by friends
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Embarrassed to constantly ask questions and look 'dumb'
related_quotes: I didn’t do the homework. I didn’t study for test.

behavior_patterns.condition: When struggling with course material in front of peers
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Not paying attention in class or sleeping, and 'playing around' in class or being distracted by friends
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Embarrassed to constantly ask questions and look 'dumb'
